description: The promise text matches EXACTLY and the watcher/anchor would both pass, but the turn's own text carries NO evidence marker (no PR link, no pass/green/ok, no file:line, no checkmark). evidence_required defaults true, so the promise MUST be ignored and the loop re-feeds instead of stopping. Only the evidence variable changed vs. evidence-gated-done/satisfied.

harness_invocation.cwd: this fixture's .orchestrator/ tree copied into an isolated temp dir

notes: A bare <promise>...</promise> with no in-turn evidence is exactly the case the loop is designed to ignore — the classic 'the agent just says done' failure mode this contract exists to prevent.
The re-fed header must NOT claim completion; it re-feeds the goal body with the next iteration number.
